_doc: Slot inventory for the Relatedness Atlas. Slots are the cross-page selection / scope handles (atlas-wide and shared-with-atlas-core). Round 1 (2026-05-11) declares the four slots the legacy single-file pages already mutate via state.* — but does not yet wire them into AtlasState. The migration only adds _label + _doc; the AtlasState wiring is a follow-up round.

selected_individual._doc: Currently focused individual in the Population Browser tree. Drives the Inspector / Stats panel and the breadcrumb's leaf segment. Atlas-private (not shared with sibling atlases) in round 1; may be promoted to shared.activeSample in a later round if it makes sense to keep selection across atlas switches.

selected_family._doc: Currently focused family in the Population Browser tree. Drives the breadcrumb's middle segment and the Network panel's centre.

activeChromosome._doc: Chromosome filter for the Karyotypes and Inversions tables and the Compatibility per-chrom mode. Currently lives in state.selected_chromosome; promoted to a scope_picker so it is visible in the atlas-core scopebar.

inspector_pair._doc: The (A, B) individual pair currently displayed in the Inspector / Stats panel and the Mendelian-check breakdown. Atlas-private.
